ocr_snippet: SR. No. Patient’s Name – Sr. Adm. No. 81282 Sleeping & Comfortable. Recorded, I.P. | Incharge’, Card. Doctor also approved of the line treatment. So, please continue as prescribed. Nitesh Sharma is a 4 yr old male. As the patient is suffering from typhoid fever, so discovered in Widal test. The patient is now tolerated LTZ well. Monitor Vitals as usual & continue the line of treatment. All are stable. S.O. to continue IV fluids, Antibiotics and all other treatments as prescribed. Kindly revert as soon as possible.
